title: Software Developer
description:
Responsibilities

  • Analyse complex business requirements and translate them into scalable, enterprise-grade Salesforce solutions

  • Design, develop, and maintain advanced Salesforce functionality using Apex, triggers, and custom UI components

  • Diagnose and resolve system issues across integrated Salesforce environments

  • Collaborate with business and technical stakeholders to validate requirements and provide solution recommendations

  • Implement and manage integrations with external platforms and government systems using Salesforce APIs

  • Ensure adherence to Salesforce best practices, security standards, and documentation requirements

Requirements

  • Salesforce Platform Developer certification is must for designing, building, and deploying custom applications, user interfaces, and business logic using Apex and Visualforce on the Lightning Platform.

  • Minimum 3 to 5 years of hands-on Salesforce development experience, with strong expertise in Service Cloud

  • Advanced experience in Salesforce customisation, including Apex, Visualforce, and Lightning development

  • Proven experience with system integrations (APIs, SFTP) and large-scale data migration using CRM tools; experience with DB2-based systems (e.g. Curam) is advantageous

  • Strong Salesforce configuration and administration experience, including security controls, automation, data models, and reporting

  • Experience with Salesforce Public Sector Solutions, OmniStudio, or OmniScript is an added advantage

postedCompany.description:
Welcome to Skubbs, where we're on a mission to make technology more delightful and accessible for everyone. Our mission is simple yet powerful: "To deliver, with excellence, timely apps that users love to use." At Skubbs, we're not just creating apps; we're crafting experiences that leave users excited, engaged, and satisfied. Our vision is equally inspiring: "To be equated with apps that everyone loves," reflecting our commitment to setting the gold standard for user-centric app development.

Our Values:

At the heart of our company culture are four core value pillars that shape everything we do:

Passion: We're passionate about our work, and it shows in the apps we create. Our enthusiasm fuels our creativity and drives us to go above and beyond to exceed expectations.

Constant Improvements: We thrive on learning and growth. Embracing change, we're always looking for ways to make our apps better, staying ahead of the curve in the ever-evolving tech landscape.

Teamwork: Collaboration is our secret sauce. We believe that diverse talents coming together lead to innovation and success. Our teams are supportive, respectful, and inclusive.

Innovativeness: Innovation is in our DNA. We encourage daring ideas, out-of-the-box thinking, and pushing boundaries. Our commitment to innovation keeps us at the forefront of the industry.

Why Join Us:

Skubbs isn't just a workplace; it's a community of creative minds dedicated to making a difference in the tech world. Here's why you should consider being a part of our dynamic team:

Innovative Culture: Skubbs is the place to be if you want to be at the forefront of technology. Your ideas and creativity will be valued and celebrated.

Professional Growth: We invest in your development and provide opportunities for you to learn, grow, and advance in your career.

Work-Life Harmony: We believe in balance. We offer flexible work arrangements and prioritize your well-being.

Fun and Professionalism: We maintain a professional environment while ensuring there's room for fun and celebration. Expect regular team-building activities and moments of shared joy.

Impactful Work: Your contributions will directly impact our mission of creating apps that users genuinely love and enjoy.

If you're ready to join a company that's not just building apps but shaping experiences, and if you're passionate about technology, innovation, and making a difference, Skubbs is the place for you. Come be a part of our journey towards becoming synonymous with apps that everyone loves.

Skubbs is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and welcome candidates from all backgrounds.
postedCompany.name: SKUBBS PRIVATE LIMITED
